heroHeadline: Day 40: Succession Vacuum Enters Seventh Week; Semana Santa Security Operation Active
heroSubtitle: Day 40 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco. O3 (Juan Carlos Valencia González) maintains control under a collective council structure enforced by Grupo Élite's paramilitary capacity. El Jardinero (Audias Flores Silva) — primary high-value targeting objective with a $5 million U.S. bounty — remains at large. Operativo Semana Santa Segura 2026 (March 27–April 12) has mobilized 10,000+ security forces nationally, running parallel to ongoing World Cup security buildup in Guadalajara. Operativo Enjambre cumulative total: 64+ officials detained across Jalisco, Michoacán, and additional states.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, U.S. Treasury (OFAC), InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, Wall Street Journal, France 24, CGTN, Al Jazeera, Latin Times, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, WOLA, Milenio, Excélsior, Proceso, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: April 3, 2026.
